title: GROUP_LEAVE: leave notification enqueued for offline members without membership re-check
description: GROUP_LEAVE calls broadcast_to_group with group_id=None (line ~2017 ws.rs), disabling the offline-enqueue membership re-check. This means if member B is offline when A leaves, B receives an offline-queued GROUP_DELIVER(leave) even if B already left the group between list_group_members and the enqueue. Contrast with GROUP_SEND, which correctly passes Some(&group_id) to trigger the membership guard. The leak is cosmetic (wrong leave notification delivered) but demonstrates the guard is present but not applied here.
